ham.subject: Your Flipkart Order #1234567890 has been shipped!
ham.body:
Hi [Name],

Thank you for shopping with Flipkart. Your order #1234567890 has been shipped and is on its way. Below are the details:

Item: Sony WH-1000XM4 Wireless Headphones
Quantity: 1
Price: ₹ 13,999.00
Shipping: ₹ 199

Estimated delivery: 2-3 business days

You can track your delivery status by clicking the link below:
<URL>

If you have any questions, contact our support at help@flipkart.com.

Thanks for choosing Flipkart!

Best regards,
Flipkart Customer Support

spam.subject: Urgent: Verify Your Zoom Account Before Tomorrow’s Meeting
spam.body:
Hello [Name],

We received a notification that your Zoom meeting with the Project Lead is scheduled for tomorrow at 10:00 AM. Due to a recent security update, you must verify your Zoom account before the meeting to avoid suspension.

Please click the link below to confirm your credentials and join the meeting:
<URL>

If you do not confirm within 24 hours, your account will be automatically suspended for security reasons.

Thank you,
Zoom Security Team
